summary: Event management app with persistent event photo storage and management functionality for organizers
architectural_notes: Event photos stored in Motoko canister using stable memory for permanent persistence
Images persist across browser sessions and tab closures
No size or format restrictions on uploaded images

existing_features.title: Add event photo upload interface to the OrganizerDashboard page with file input supporting JPG, PNG, and WebP formats, upload progress indicator, and preview of uploaded images
Create an event photo gallery component that displays all uploaded event photos in a grid layout with full-size lightbox view and navigation controls
Add delete buttons to each event photo in the gallery that trigger deleteEventPhoto backend call with confirmation dialog before deletion
Create React Query hooks for event photo operations: useUploadEventPhoto, useGetEventPhotos, and useDeleteEventPhoto with proper cache invalidation

new_feature_requests.summary: Backend storage for event photos using stable memory
Image upload interface in organizers section
Gallery view to display uploaded event photos
Delete functionality for organizers to remove event photos
Add stable storage for event photos in the backend with fields for photo ID, organizer principal, image blob data, content type, filename, and upload timestamp
Implement backend methods for uploading event photos (uploadEventPhoto) that accepts image blob data, content type, and filename, returning the created photo ID
Implement backend method for retrieving event photos (getEventPhotos) that returns all photos belonging to the calling organizer with image data and metadata
Implement backend method for deleting event photos (deleteEventPhoto) that accepts a photo ID and removes it from storage, with authorization check to ensure only the photo owner can delete
